faqs.question: Does SpaceWing offer corporate mission packages?
faqs.answer: Yes! SpaceWing Corporate Missions provide unique opportunities for team-building, client entertainment, and executive retreats. Packages include: exclusive use of spacecraft, customized training programs, branded mission elements, meeting facilities in space, professional documentation, and ground support. Corporate missions start at $8 million for a 3-day orbital experience with up to 12 participants.

faqs.question: Can I charter an entire spacecraft?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Private charter missions offer the ultimate exclusive experience. You can charter StarHopper (up to 6 passengers), OrbitalOne (up to 12 passengers), or MoonGlider (up to 8 passengers). Charter includes customization of the mission profile, private training sessions, custom menus, and complete privacy. Contact our Private Missions team for pricing and availability.

faqs.question: What corporate events can be held in space?
faqs.answer: The possibilities are endless! Past corporate events include: executive team-building retreats, client appreciation events, product launches (unveiling products in zero-G is unforgettable!), board meetings, incentive trips for top performers, and partnership celebrations. Our Events Team can create custom experiences tailored to your business objectives.

faqs.question: Can we brand the spacecraft?
faqs.answer: Yes, for private charter missions, we offer various branding options: company logos on the exterior (visible in photos), custom interior elements, branded crew uniforms, personalized mission patches, custom menus with company branding, and branded commemorative items. Additional fees apply based on the extent of customization.

faqs.question: What is included in a corporate mission package?
faqs.answer: Corporate Mission packages typically include: private spacecraft charter, customized training program for all participants, all accommodations and meals, professional photography and videography, ground transportation, dedicated mission coordinator, post-flight celebration event, commemorative items for all participants, and media relations support if desired.

faqs.question: How far in advance should corporate missions be booked?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking corporate missions 12-18 months in advance to allow for customization and coordination. However, we occasionally have availability on shorter notice. Contact our Corporate Sales team to discuss your timeline. Holiday periods and popular dates book earliest.

faqs.question: Can we invite clients on corporate missions?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Corporate missions are excellent for client entertainment. Many companies use space travel as the ultimate client appreciation experience. Participants must complete our standard medical screening and training, but the process is streamlined for corporate groups. Some restrictions may apply for international clients.

faqs.question: Are there educational programs for companies?
faqs.answer: Yes! SpaceWing offers educational components for corporate missions including: team dynamics workshops in zero-G, leadership development exercises, innovation sessions with space technology experts, and collaboration with our research partners. These programs can be integrated into your mission or offered as standalone experiences.

faqs.question: What privacy measures are in place for private missions?
faqs.answer: Private missions receive the highest level of discretion. Non-disclosure agreements are available for all staff, no other passengers are present, flight paths and timing remain confidential, and media coverage is entirely at your discretion. Many high-profile individuals and corporations choose private missions precisely for this privacy.

faqs.question: How do we book a corporate mission?
faqs.answer: Contact our Corporate Sales team at corporate@spacewing.com or 1-800-SPACE-WING ext. 4. A dedicated Corporate Mission Specialist will guide you through the process: initial consultation, mission design, proposal presentation, contract finalization, and mission coordination. We make planning your corporate space mission seamless and exciting.
